rawIntent: Add a padLeft utility under src/shared/utils/pad-left that left-pads a string to a target length

successCriteria.description: The padLeft utility correctly left-pads a string to the specified target length.

constraints: Every state-changing operation produces an audit record.
RBAC enforced at middleware, never inline.
Input validated at the API boundary.
outOfScope: Modifications to existing utilities or functions outside of padLeft.
Changes to the directory structure beyond the specified path.
